_note: Hand-curated PRIMARY ground truth for documentation-recommendation accuracy. Real inputs (the harvested release), human-judged labels (single annotator — see DESIGN). Kept outside data/mocks/ so re-harvesting never overwrites it. Each label ties a doc to the substantive change that should trigger its update.

impactedDocs.rationale: Primary guide for APIRouter / include_router. The routing-internals refactor (FAPI-1003 / PR #15745) changes include_router semantics and makes router.routes a tree rather than a flat list, so the examples and explanation need updating.
Uses router.routes directly in an example. FAPI-1006 adds iter_route_contexts() as the supported replacement for iterating routes, so this example should be migrated.
Documents convert_underscores for header parameters. FAPI-1002 changes underscore-header handling (no longer accepting underscore headers by default), so the behavior note must be updated.
